chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Appeal No.D- 175 of 2003 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For further order. Appellant had already been released in present crime vide judgment dated 03.02.2005 passed in Criminal Jail Appeal No.D-166/2003 compliance copy of the same is flagged herewith for kind perusal 21.02.2018. None present for appellant. Syed Meeral Shah A.P.G. for the State. This appeal is called for hearing. It appears from the record that the appellant had already been released in present crime vide judgment dated 03.02.2005, passed in Cr. Jail Appeal No.D-166 of 2003. Since the appellant has already been released in the present crime, therefore, this appeal has become infructuous and is liable to be disposed of. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
